title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - CloudAWS
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 12 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 93.3%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 83.3%, and average score is 7.32/10. Total training hours are 224 and scaled cost is 11. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training program for the AWS Cloud Architecture & Services course has achieved a high completion rate of 100% and a solid attendance rate of 93.3%. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk due to a pass rate of 83.3%, indicating that some trainees did not meet the expected performance threshold. The average score of 7.32/10 suggests that while most trainees are performing adequately, there is room for improvement, particularly for those who require additional support.
insights: AWS Cloud Architecture & Services has an effectiveness score of 85.76 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
2 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.
The course successfully engaged 12 trainees, all of whom completed the training.
The feedback rating of 4.71/5 indicates a positive reception of the course content and delivery.

The total training hours amounted to 224, with a scaled cost of 11, resulting in a low ROI proxy of 0.024, suggesting that the financial investment may not be yielding proportional performance improvements.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, a review of the course content and delivery methods should be conducted to identify potential improvements that could increase the pass rate.
Consideration should also be given to optimizing the training format to improve ROI, possibly by exploring self-paced learning options or adjusting the course structure.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
